The US proposes new tariffs of at least 10% on imports from 60 trading partners after an investigation into the handling of goods. David Layton, CEO of Partners Group, discusses the redemption pressure seen among individual investors as the private equity firm caps withdrawals at on one of its evergreen funds. title: Political Backlash Over UK Police Response To Fatal Stabbing
title_cn: 英国警方对致命刺伤事件的反应引发政治强烈反对
summary: The police response to a fatal stabbing in the UK has sparked outrage across the political spectrum and prompted protests outside a police station. Henry Nowak was handcuffed as he lay dying in December after his killer, Vickrum Digwa, falsely accused him of racism. In bodycam footage, the 18-year-old can be heard telling officers, "I've been stabbed," to which one officer responds, "I don't think you have." Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he felt "sick" after watching the footage, while Reform UK Leader Nigel Farage said the reaction to the case should be one of "pure, cold rage." Bloomberg's UK Politics Reporter James Woolcock joined Caroline Hepker and Stephen Carroll to discuss the political fallout and growing public anger over the case. (Source: Bloomberg)

Meanwhile US President Donald Trump is proposing new tariffs of at least 10% on imports from 60 trading partners

title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes, Trump Begins Rebuilding Tariff Wall | The Opening Trade 6/3/2026
title_cn: 美国与伊朗交锋，特朗普开始重建关税墙 |开盘交易 6/3/2026
summary:
US stocks struggled to build on record gains as growing strains on the ceasefire between the US and Iran sent oil prices higher for a third straight day. The cautious mood follows flare-ups in the Middle East that are testing a fragile truce between Washington and Tehran, with US forces intercepting ballistic missiles and drones aimed at neighboring countries and striking an Iranian command center in response.

The US is proposing new tariffs of at least 10% on imports from 60 trading partners in President Donald Trump’s biggest move to rebuild his protectionist wall since his earlier levies were struck down by the US Supreme Court.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia CEO Pitches ‘Insane’ AI Returns to Billionaire Families

title: AI Saves Time But Most Companies Waste the Gain, Study Shows
title_cn: 研究显示，人工智能可以节省时间，但大多数公司却浪费了收益
summary: Employees across industries continue to adopt AI tools at a rapid rate, yet the technology’s impact on productivity and efficiency is uneven and muddled, according to a new study.

title: JPMorgan Lifts S&P Target on Earnings 'Supercycle'
title_cn: 摩根大通上调标普盈利“超级周期”目标
summary: Nataliia Lipikhina, head of EMEA equity strategy at JPMorgan Private Bank, says she sees the US earnings "supercycle" to drive stocks to fresh records. "We actually just recently lifted our S&P target, and we think that the earnings growth in 2026 can be 20%," Lipikhina tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Palantir’s £330 Million NHS Deal Under Fire From UK Lawmakers
title_cn: Palantir 3.3 亿英镑的 NHS 交易遭到英国立法者的批评
summary: British members of parliament are calling on the government to end a major deal with Palantir Technologies Inc. and disclose more details of a military contract with the company, as UK political tension involving the controversial data firm ramps up.

title: TikTok Billionaire Tops Ambani as Asia’s Second-Richest
title_cn: TikTok亿万富翁超越安巴尼成为亚洲第二富豪
summary: TikTok billionaire Zhang Yiming has overtaken India’s Mukesh Ambani to become Asia’s second-richest person after a rise in ByteDance’s valuation and further progress in the Chinese firm’s AI ambitions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Toilet Maker Toto Ramps Up Its Ceramics for AI Chipmakers
title_cn: 马桶制造商 Toto 为人工智能芯片制造商提升陶瓷产品
summary: Japanese toilet maker Toto Ltd. expects spending in its chip-related operations to make up more than half its total capex in coming years, as it chases new gains from an artificial intelligence surge.

title: Software Startup Factorial Raises Funds at $2.5 Billion Value
title_cn: 软件初创公司 Factorial 筹集了价值 25 亿美元的资金
summary: Human resources software startup Factorial has raised $150 million in funding at a valuation of $2.5 billion, making it one of the most highly valued startups in Spain.

title: Global Funds Buy Japan as They Flee Asia’s Hottest Stock Markets
title_cn: 全球基金逃离亚洲最热门股市，买入日本股票
summary: The global AI trade has turned South Korea and Taiwan into Asia’s top two stock markets this year. Yet for foreign investors, the region’s most compelling destination lies elsewhere: Japan.

title: BYD-Backed Robotics Firm PaXini Is Said to Explore Hong Kong IPO
title_cn: 比亚迪支持的机器人公司 PaXini 据称将探索香港 IPO
summary: PaXini Tech, a maker of dexterous robotic hands and humanoid robots, is considering a Hong Kong initial public offering, people familiar with the matter said, the latest in the sector looking to tap investor demand.

title: Baidu CFO Haijian He on AI Revenue, Robotaxis
title_cn: Baidu CFO Haijian He on AI Revenue, Robotaxis
summary: Baidu CFO Haijian He speaks to Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin about how the company's AI-related revenue has reached 50%, explaining the benefits of its integrated services offering and the potential of its robotaxi business. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Sets Aside $1 Billion to Shield Airlines From Fuel Shocks
title_cn: 印度拨出 10 亿美元保护航空公司免受燃油冲击
summary: India will provide 100 billion rupees ($1 billion) to support oil retailers for capping jet fuel prices and shield local airlines from mounting cost pressures.

title: Trump Blames Court Block for Collapse of ‘Weaponization’ Fund
title_cn: 特朗普将“武器化”基金的崩溃归咎于法院封锁
summary: President Donald Trump said his administration was dropping plans for a $1.8 billion fund to pay victims of alleged government “weaponization” only because a federal court temporarily blocked the move, which had become a political lightning rod.

title: GOP Nudges Trump to Stay Focused as Election Pressure Grows
title_cn: 随着选举压力的增大，共和党敦促特朗普保持专注
summary: Republicans are increasingly raising sharp questions about the president’s moves

title: Indonesia Names Ex-Head of Free Meals Plan a Corruption Suspect
title_cn: 印度尼西亚将免费膳食计划前负责人列为腐败嫌疑人
summary: Indonesian prosecutors named the former chief of a $15 billion free meals program as a key corruption suspect, less than a day after removing him from office.

title: Row Over WWII Fighters Who Killed Poles Fuels Ukraine Tensions
title_cn: 二战战士杀害波兰人的争论加剧了乌克兰紧张局势
summary: Ukraine’s top diplomat urged Polish politicians not to “spin the flywheel of hatred” after criticism in Warsaw of Kyiv’s decision to name a military unit after World War II-era Ukrainian nationalist fighters whom Poland holds responsible for massacres of its people.

title: Trump Says He Swore at Netanyahu Over Lebanon Attacks
title_cn: 特朗普称他就黎巴嫩袭击事件向内塔尼亚胡咒骂
summary: Donald Trump said he swore at Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in a call this week as the US president tried to deescalate fighting in Lebanon and keep peace talks with Iran on track.

title: EU Warns Bulgaria of Excessive Deficit Months After Joining Euro
title_cn: 加入欧元区数月后欧盟警告保加利亚赤字过高
summary: The European Union recommended adding Bulgaria to a list of countries violating budget balance rules just six months after the Balkan country adopted the euro.

title: Hungary’s Orban Ordered Ukrainian ‘Gold Convoy’ Raid, Telex Says
title_cn: 电传称，匈牙利欧尔班下令袭击乌克兰“黄金车队”
summary: Former Hungarian premier Viktor Orban must be held accountable for the way he directed the secret services, Prime Minister Peter Magyar said, after a report alleged the ex-leader ordered a March raid on a Ukrainian bank’s convoy.

title: Stoltenberg Sees Norway’s Tax System Driving Slow Retreat From Oil and Gas
title_cn: 斯托尔滕贝格认为挪威的税收制度正在推动石油和天然气的缓慢撤退
summary: Economy’s growing concentration on the oil and gas industry has sparked concerns

title: Putin’s Next Ombudsman Wants Less Jail Time for Businessmen
title_cn: 普京的下一任监察员希望减少商人的监禁时间
summary: Russia’s next business ombudsman wants to see fewer entrepreneurs winding up in jail or pre-trial detention, arguing that imprisonment remains overused in cases of economic crimes despite years of legal reforms.

title: First Oil Supertanker Moors at Kharg Island in Almost a Month
title_cn: 近一个月来第一艘超级油轮停泊在哈格岛
summary: The first oil supertanker in almost a month has been spotted moored at Iran’s main crude-export facility in the northern Persian Gulf, highlighting the largely effective nature of an American blockade on Tehran’s shipping.

title: US, Iran Exchange Military Strikes to Put Fresh Strains on Ceasefire
title_cn: 美国和伊朗相互军事打击，给停火带来新的压力
summary: The US and Iran clashed again overnight, with Kuwait and Bahrain caught in the crossfire of one the most serious flare-ups since a ceasefire went into effect in early April.

title: East Africa Braces for Abiy Return in Ethiopia
title_cn: 东非等待阿比·艾哈迈德返回埃塞俄比亚
summary: Bound for another term, Ethiopia’s prime minister has a long list of tensions to deal with.

title: Trio of EU States Break Ranks to Push Further Banking Reforms
title_cn: 欧盟三国打破排名推动进一步银行业改革
summary: France, Italy and Spain are proposing a package of reforms that would ease the way for banks doing cross-border business in Europe, according to documents seen by Bloomberg News.

title: Power Struggle Engulfs Philippine Senate After Fresh Shakeup
title_cn: 新改组后菲律宾参议院陷入权力斗争
summary: A power struggle erupted at the Philippine Senate on Wednesday after one faction named an acting leader, a move the incumbent head described as “illegal,” further heightening political tensions in the Southeast Asian nation.

title: EU Risks Losing More Than 1 Million Jobs Over Global Pressures
title_cn: 欧盟面临因全球压力而失去超过 100 万个工作岗位的风险
summary: The European Union is at risk of losing more than 1 million jobs this year over the Iran war’s economic fallout and rising global competition, the bloc’s executive warned.

title: China Denies Forced Labor, Slams US Probe as Tariff ‘Pretext’
title_cn: 中国否认强迫劳动，抨击美国调查是关税“借口”
summary: China hit back at any suggestion it uses forced labor and said trade issues with the US should be sorted out in talks.

title: Solomon Islands Leader Says He’ll Review China Security Deal
title_cn: 所罗门群岛领导人表示将审查中国安全协议
summary: The new leader of the Solomon Islands will review a 2022 security deal with China, an agreement that sparked alarm from Australia, the US and others.

title: Denmark Taps Ex-Premier to Resolve US Dispute Over Greenland
title_cn: 丹麦聘请前总理解决美国格陵兰岛争端
summary: Denmark’s new government tapped Lars Lokke Rasmussen as foreign minister, retaining a key architect of Copenhagen’s response to US pressure over Greenland to steer the next phase of talks with Washington.

title: Iran Didn’t Get Any Crude Oil Past US Blockade in May, UANI Says
title_cn: UANI称，伊朗5月份没有通过美国封锁获得任何原油
summary: Iran struggled to get energy exports past the US Navy’s blockade last month, with around 80 million barrels of oil and petrochemicals stranded in waters behind the line, according to a US non-profit advisory group.

title: Venezuela’s Rodríguez to Visit India as War Reshapes Oil Trade
title_cn: 战争重塑石油贸易，委内瑞拉总统罗德里格斯将访问印度
summary: Venezuela’s acting President Delcy Rodríguez will meet Prime Minister Narendra Modi this week, with energy security expected to dominate discussions as India seeks to diversify crude supplies disrupted by the Iran war.

title: Trump Tariffs: China, UK, Europe Among US Trade Partners Targeted | Daybreak Europe 06/03/2026
title_cn: 特朗普关税：美国贸易伙伴中的中国、英国和欧洲欧洲黎明 06/03/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

The US is proposing new tariffs of at least 10% on imports from 60 trading partners following an investigation into goods allegedly produced by forced labor, as President Donald Trump seeks to rebuild the sweeping tariff wall struck down by the US Supreme Court.

In the Middle East, US forces intercepted Iranian ballistic missiles and drones aimed at neighboring countries and struck a command center in the Islamic Republic in response — the latest flare-up to test a fragile ceasefire.

And Bloomberg learns that SpaceX could set the terms of its record-breaking IPO as soon as today, as Reuters reports it's looking to raise 75 billion dollars. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fresh US-Iran Fighting Puts Ceasefire Under Strain
title_cn: 美国与伊朗的新战斗使停火面临压力
summary: US forces intercepted Iranian ballistic missiles and drones aimed at neighboring Middle East countries and struck a command center in the Islamic Republic in response. The exchange followed days of Israeli military escalation against Iran-backed Hezbollah in Lebanon. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Becerra, Hilton Take Early Lead in California Governor Race
title_cn: 贝塞拉和希尔顿在加州州长竞选中领先
summary: Republican Steve Hilton and Democrat Xavier Becerra surged to the top of California’s crowded gubernatorial primary, with billionaire Tom Steyer trailing in a contest shaped by money, scandal and uncertainty.

title: Kenya Pressed on Details of Ebola Center Deal With US
title_cn: 肯尼亚就与美国的埃博拉中心协议细节施压
summary: A Kenyan high court instructed the authorities to disclose details of an agreement with the US government to establish an Ebola quarantine facility in the East African nation. The latest outbreak of Ebola has been concentrated in northeastern Democratic Republic of Congo and been declared a global emergency by the World Health Organization. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
